diagnosis: The level is an extremely wide horizontal corridor (hundreds of tiles) with a single repeated macro-structure: a continuous, undulating curve of solid platforms at varying heights but no gaps, ladders, ceilings, or distinct spatial contexts. The player completed 23.8 seconds with zero deaths or falls, killed one enemy, and rated it 2/5, explicitly noting the lack of ladders and platform variance. The design offers traversal without meaningful interaction — no vertical traversal mechanics, no elevation changes that require climbing/descending, and no encounter variety — confirming it functions as a 'walk simulator' along a curved floor.
